itemData.name: Painter's Servant
flavourText: Bloodshed on the crimson shores,
longing for the endless sea.
Treasures, life, I'd give it all
just to capture thee.

itemData.name: Headhunter
explicitMods: When you kill a [Rarity|Rare] monster, you gain its [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] for 60 seconds
flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

itemData.name: Morior Invictus
explicitMods: 8.2 Life Regeneration per second per Socket filled
+10% to all [Resistances|Elemental Resistances] per Socket filled
flavourText: The Unblinking Eye did not cower and wail.
They stood against the end.

itemData.name: Lavianga's Spirits
explicitMods: This Flask cannot be Used but applies its Effect constantly
flavourText: "How do I cope with what I witnessed on Wraeclast?
Thank the Ancestors! My cup, it overflows."
- Lavianga, former advisor to Kaom
itemData.descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refill at [Wells|Wells] or by killing monsters.
